title: Prati Roju Pandaage
synopsis: With only a few weeks left to live, an aging grandfather is visited by his grandson who wishes to fulfill his desires.

title: Prema Antha Easy Kadu
synopsis: Karthik (Rajesh Kumar) fell in love with Prema(Prajwal Poovaiah) from his childhood. But for some unforeseen circumstances, Karthik got banished from the village and his father was forced to take care of her for certain time. Few years later, Karthik returned to the village and asked her to love him. But she refuses to love him. Karthik is adamant to find out what is the obstacle that is separating them.

title: Prema Katha Chithram 2
synopsis: Her unrequited love for a college mate leads a young woman to take her own life. Things take a dark turn when her spirit returns to haunt those who had caused her heartbreak.

title: Prema katha Chitram 2
synopsis: Bindu (Siddhi Idnani) is head over heels for Sudheer (Sumanth Ashwin) but he falls for another girl Nandu (Nandita Swetha). Bindu who is unable to bear that commits suicide. Her spirit possesses Nandu and gives a hard time to Sudheer and his friends. How Sudheer drives the spirit away from Nandu's body and saves her life is the rest of the story of Prema Kadha Chitram 2.

title: Raghupathi Venkaiah Naidu
synopsis: Raghupathi Venkaiah Naidu (Naresh), born in the year 1887 at Machilipatnam of AP, is widely regarded as father of Telugu Cinema and is an art enthusiast from an early age. He travels to Madras to pursue photography and what turns him into a pioneer of Telugu cinema is what the story is all about.

title: Rahasyam
synopsis: It is about an aspiring director who gets a chance of making his first horror thriller. In order to make one, he decides to know more about evil spirits. In a sudden turn of events there, an evil spirit called Divya (Rithika) starts chasing him and forces Ravi to cast her as the heroine of the film.

title: Raja Vaaru Rani Gaaru
synopsis: Raja Vaaru Rani Gaaru is the story of Raju who falls in love with Rani but is unable to express his emotions. Set in a beautiful village, watch as Raju and two of his friends deal with the toils and troubles of romance.

title: Rajdooth
synopsis: A 25-year-old rouge's quest for an old Rajdooth bike. He, along with his friend backtrack the lost bike from Pochampally to Khammam to various other places in Andhra Pradesh and in the process realize their responsibilities and nitty-gritties of living a life.

title: Raju Gari Gadhi 3
synopsis: An unknown spirit guards Maya against any possible threats from eve-teasers and Don Juans. But what happens when true love flourishes between Maya and Ashwin Babu, and the spirit isn't all too happy about it?

title: Rakshasudu
synopsis: Arun, a newly recruited sub-inspector, sets out in pursuit of a mysterious serial killer who targets teen girls and murders them brutally. His hunt for the psychopath will come at a price, but nothing will stop Arun from ending the killer's vicious murder spree.

title: Rama Chakkani Seetha
synopsis: Rama Chakkani Seetha tells the story of Balu and Anu, and how they fall for each other.

title: Ranarangam
synopsis: Deva "Sharwanand" is an ambitious guy who doesn't mind taking an illegal route to earning money. He stars bootlegging liquor during the prohibition era. In doing so, he finds himself to be at the wrong side local MLA Simhachalam "Murali Sharma". While all this is happening, Deva also falls in love with Geetha "Kalyani Priyadarshan". How Deva becomes a big gangster who operates from a foreign location? Where is Geetha, and what do his foes do, is what the movie is all about?

title: Rangupaduddi
synopsis: Six people. One haunted bungalow. A long night of terrors. Will they succeed or succumb?

title: Rayalaseema Love Story
synopsis: Rayalaseema Love Story is a thrilling combination of romance and action directed by Ram Ranadheer.

title: RDX Love
synopsis: RDX Love talks about Alivelu (Payal) who takes charge of a village and solves their issues against all odds.

title: R.I.P - Rage in Progress
synopsis: Sudheer is forced to join his evil friend to make a living, it becomes too late before he corrects himself.

title: Romantic Criminals
synopsis: Habituated to drugs, a young couple commits various crimes with the help of a drug peddler. One fine day, they decide to stop all the crimes and settle down in life. Will they be able to come out of the crime world easily

title: Ruler
synopsis: A businesswoman adopts a stranger who saves her life and raises him as her son. However, the man has a dark past that catches up with him despite his mother's attempts to shield him from it.

title: Saaho
synopsis: A man uses an arsenal of weapons to battle a gang of heavily armed thugs in the city. With the city under fire and people's lives at risk, the one man has to give everything he has got to take the city back.

title: Safe
synopsis: Shreya opens a Pandora's box of sexual abuse cases that point to a high profile celebrity. Amidst rising crime and violence, Arundhati, a Social Activist starts a public movement called SAFE to protect women, children and the aged.

title: Sakala Kala Vallabhudu
synopsis: Srinu is a happy go lucky village youth who falls in love with Chaitra. Things become difficult for Srinu when he finds out that Lilly, who doesn't like him, happens to be Chaitra's best friend. Despite Srinu's many careful attempts to woo Chaitra, Lilly keeps creating problems for him. Just when Chaitra starts getting feelings for Srinu, something unexpected happens.

title: Samaram
synopsis: The movie setting is based on a true story. a back drop of suspense, crime and lust. The movie focuses on sexual harassment of working women. This movie is thoroughly gripping, heart stopping, action packed thriller and most importantly adresses the core issue of sexual harassment of women. Fresh, young and energetic casts bring life and emotion into the movie with never a dull moment.

title: Sambhavami yuge yuge
synopsis: The plot of this short film revolves around a line from the Bhagavad Gita: "sambhavami yuge yuge," where the lead character fails his sister as his blood relative and seeks redemption, for his mistakes. And also mentions of diverse topics such as work investment and social justice issues.

title: Sandhyavela
synopsis: Lakshmi and Krishna are siblings who have made an arrangement of taking care of their bedridden Mother alternatively. one day this mundanity perpetrates Lakshmi to take her an action which coincides with Krishna's arrival leaving Lakshmi in deep guilt and fear.

title: Seven
synopsis: A police officer is bewildered by conflicting statements about Karthik's identity. Several young women seem to share a mysterious connection with him. An old man claims to know Karthik as Krishnamurthy, who died thirty years ago.

title: Sita
synopsis: A four-year-old Ram is left in a monastery by a person named Anand Mohan and is promised that Sita will come to take care of him. Ram is innocent and cute. He makes Ram promise that he too, will take care of Sita in return. However, after 20 years of waiting, when Sita finally meets Ram, she is far from good intentions towards Ram and is only after the 5000 crore estate. The plot revolves around the final fate of Ram and Sita in light of these discoveries.

title: Sivappu Manjal Pachai
synopsis: Rajashekar is a strict traffic police officer whose marriage is arranged with Madhan's sister. However, Madhan, an arrogant street racer, cannot forgive Rajashekar for humiliating him in the past.

title: Sivaranjani
synopsis: Karthik (Nandu) is a Creative Director and Chairman of U and I advertising Agency. When he is coming back from work his car become break down in midnight due to less coolant. While searching for the water he found a girl (Rashmi Gautam) in water pond. Karthik joined her in Hospital. She gets cured but lost her memory. Since her memory loss she forgot her name, and then Karthik named her as Madhu. Frequently few unknown recollections are bothering her intense. Karthik took her to a place where his brother and sister-in-law stay along with him. Sivaranjani have been saved from Durga Bhai (Delhi Rajeswari) and Malhotra's (Rajendra) magical powers. Karthik and Madhu were in deep love and they tend to get marry soon. All of a sudden, a stranger name called Rishi came to Madhu and revealed that she is his wife and her name is Sivaranjani. In the mean time Madhu had a doubt on him. Madhu alias Sivaranjani fiercely shifted to Rishi's house with some evidences shown by Rishi. But still unknown recollections are influencing her to found some hidden facts. In that process she found wrist watch with blood stains in Rishi's car back side of the trunk. When she questioned Rishi, he told that "you had an illegal affair with my partner kaushik (Indra) who came from US. You killed koushik because of his cheating attitude. When I have tried to save you, I took out his body and burnt him in the city outskirts.. May be during that time my watch might have fallen in that place". Do you think.. Sivaranjani is a culprit? - Why unknown recollections are bothering her quite often?? What was the hidden truth???

title: Sixer
synopsis: A site engineer, who suffers from night blindness, gets into trouble when he is mistaken for the leader of a protest group by a goon. His life becomes even more complicated after he falls in love.

title: Software Sudheer
synopsis: Chandu and Swathi are Software engineers. Chandu is an average guy who never misses an opportunity to impress Swathi. Once Swathi recognizes Chandu's honesty and innocence, the affair begins. Suddenly they find themselves stuck in a major problem. Can Chandu save Swathi?

title: Special
synopsis: A suspended police officer sets out to investigate a medico with mind-reading abilities, and a cat-and-mouse game ensues between the two. Directed by Vastav, the film stars Ajay, Ranga and Akshata in the lead roles.

title: Srujana and coffee
synopsis: "Two coffee addicts find love in their shared obsession. But as their bond grows, they wonder-can a shared habit fuel a deeper connection? This is a story where caffeine isn't the only thing they crave."

title: Stalker
synopsis: An actress goes to an audition and finds the director very intimidating. Soon she realizes that someone is stalking her leading to a run for life.

title: Super Duper
synopsis: Two petty criminals end up kidnapping the wrong woman, and end up in a situation where they have to deal with a kingpin of a drug mafia.

title: Suryakantham
synopsis: Suryakantam is the story of an eccentric girl who turns everyone's worlds upside down.

title: Swayamvada
synopsis: Swayamvada is a psychological thriller centered on a rare disease which inflicts pain not only on the affected, but also the family members of the affected. The movie explores the love of nature, the tender feelings of companionship in a relationship between a man and a woman and the extent to which a woman goes if she suffers betrayal at the hands of her lover.

title: Sye Raa Narasimha Reddy
synopsis: A historical action epic inspired by the life of Uyyalawada Narasimha Reddy, who revolted against the atrocities of East India Company 10 years before the Sepoy Mutiny.

title: Telisi Teliyaka
synopsis: "Misunderstandings spark a major conflict between a couple. How they resolve it and what they realize about each other forms the heart of the story."

title: Tenali Ramakrishna BA.BL
synopsis: Tenali ramakrishna is an aspiring lawyer who looks for a life changing case take up in his career. He falls in love with Rukmini "Hansika Motwani". She is daughter of chakravarthi "Murali sharma". Chakravarthi is a well known criminal lawyer who takes up a murder case of Varalakshmi, instead of defending varalakshmi he joins hands with the opposition and conspires to convict her. Tenali finds out about this conspiracy and rest of movie is all about how he gets Varalakshmi out of the case.

title: Thipparaa Meesam
synopsis: An extremely talented DJ working in a local night pub, who is also a spoiled brat, gets involved in an adventure where he must fight against all odds to survive.

title: Tholubommalata
synopsis: Sodala Raju wanted to get his grand-nephew and grand-niece married, but when Raju dies, how the marriage will work forms the crux of the story.

title: Thota, Shadow behind the canvas...
synopsis: 'Thota' explores the struggles, aspirations, confusions, pretensions, the communist influences and ultimately the journey of becoming the renowned artist Thota Vaikuntam. Though disillusioned with communist leaders he believes that communism would build a peaceful society with a humanistic approach. At this last phase of life, he desires to escape the 'inhuman multi-layered urbanized life' and reach his village roots. This documentary 'Thota' follows the journey of a young boy, Thota Vaikuntam from an underprivileged village which ends up in the modern flashy yet historical city of Hyderabad and the transformation of the small boy into a fully bloomed artist. 'Thota' breaks down Thota Vaikuntam's life into different stratas revealing all the shades of his life.

title: Three Drops of Life
synopsis: The son of a farmer who is influenced by his simple father realizes the importance of water, education and saving a life over a period of time.

title: Thupaki Ramudu
synopsis: Ramudu is a free-spirited, illiterate orphan from a village. Priya is a well-educated woman who runs a book store in the same village. What makes them fall in love and how they manage to face the odds that come along with it.

title: Tingarabuchi
synopsis: "A confused girl meets an intelligent guy, leading to chaotic flirting and comic misunderstandings. A tale of mixed signals and unexpected sparks."

title: Undiporaadhey
synopsis: This is a periodical love story based on real-life true events happened during the 1980s. The film revolves around a girl and a boy who meet at college admissions after that their love blossom at that point the story takes a real turn and their life becomes up and down.

title: Vanam
synopsis: A team of archaeology students head to a forest in search of fabled diamonds, but once there, the treasure hunt turns into a struggle for survival

title: Venky Mama
synopsis: A story of nephew and a son which revolves around their emotions and village drama and army based story.

title: Vinara sodara veera kumara
synopsis: Ramana falls in love with Sulochana but their relationship fails to materialize due to which he decides to end his life. He then meets a soul that communicates with him to make him realize the importance of life over love.

title: Vinaya Vidheya Rama
synopsis: When the happiness of his family is held to ransom by a violent crime lord, Ram sets out on a quest to destroy his nemesis and his criminal empire.

title: Viswamitra
synopsis: It is based on true incidents which occurred in a church in New Zealand and America. It revolves around a woman who works in a software company and is averse to men.

title: Voter
synopsis: Gautam is an NRI who returns to India to cast his vote. When challenged by the woman he loves, Bhavana , to make a politician fulfill his campaign promises if he wants to win her over, Gautam sets off on a path to change the system.

title: Where Is the Venkatalakshmi
synopsis: Set in a remote village the film revolves around the story of four characters that unfolds with the arrival of Venkatalakshmi as the new school teacher.

title: Who
synopsis: Mahesh wants to enjoy with his friends for this weekend, but to his shock, police accuse him of a murder. Mahesh and his friend somehow manages to escape from the police and now they are confused about what they have to do get out of this case. How he able find out the real murderer makes up the rest of this action packed story.

title: Wife, i
synopsis: I lost my wife. Who is responsible?

title: Yedu Chepala Katha
synopsis: Ravi has weakness for women and gets into a physical relationship with ladies. One day, he falls in love with Bhavana. He has a heath issue, which requires blood. Why is he in a relationship with many women and what will happen to his love

title: Yemaya Jaruguthundho
synopsis: "A woman, on the verge of marriage, confesses her love to her best friend. His reaction and feelings unfold, exploring the complexities of love, friendship, and timing. Their story reveals the heart's deepest truths."

title: Your's Truly Samyra
synopsis: A short film based on parallel universe and quantum entanglement among drug addicted couples.

title: 3 Monkeys
synopsis: Movie about Anand, Santosh, and Phani are three happy go lucky bachelors who are not at all serious about their lives. The twist in the tale arises when they get into a massive problem. Things become even worse when this problem leads them into a murder case.

title: 3BHK Movie 2020
synopsis: For every individual,HOME plays a vital role in their LIFE as home has a strength to hold lots of emotions, relations, confusions, fun and memories.Our story runs in a 3BHK flat around three main characters namely Balu, Hasini and Krishna.
In Hyderabad city, a courageous inspector Rudra is given a case of mysterious deaths near ATM. On his hunt he finds out the truth behind these deaths are much complicated.

title: 47 Days: The Mystery Unfolds
synopsis: Satya, a Suspended Cop, who lost his wife in mysterious circumstances, unexpectedly gets hold of a case which relates to his wife's death. He's starts investigating which eventually hunts down his past and brings chaos in his life. How Satya solved the mystery surrounding him forms the rest of the story.
70/100 is a story about the couple who is in a long distance relationship. Distance could make us forget everything
A seductress prostitute lures her clients into a specific room which is numbered as 302. What she does with them once they are inside remains a mystery.

title: Adhunikam
synopsis: Its a story that shows how these generation illegal affairs effects the mindset of kids and how far these people can go for it.

title: The Admission Letter
synopsis: The movie is about the conversation over an admission letter between a conservative father and his film making enthusiast son. What are the concerns of the father? Does son persuade his father?

title: Agaadham
synopsis: The story is set in 1980s in rural Andhra Pradesh, when a farmer - Narsingi aged 50 gets remarried to a much younger girl Lachi, while already having a son - Babu, who is almost the same age as Lachi. It is their relationship that evolves beyond convention.

title: Ala Vaikunthapurramuloo
synopsis: After growing up enduring criticism from his father, a young man finds his world shaken upon learning he was switched at birth with a millionaire's son.

title: All Is Well with Suma
synopsis: Sending bright smiles and positive vibes your way, All is well is a talk show hosted by Suma Kanakala, where she interacts with various celebrities and maintains an entertaining tenor while highlighting all the good news from around the world.

title: Amaram Akhilam Prema
synopsis: A mistake by Akhila tears her apart from her father, who loves her the most. On a journey to win her father back, she meets Amar, a carefree guy who realizes what true love is.

title: Amrutha Ramam
synopsis: Amrutha Ramam is a heartfelt love story based on a series of true experiences. The film depicts the lives of Amrutha and Ram, and how together they find the meaning of selfless love.

title: Anaganaga O Athidhi
synopsis: Mallika(Payal Rajput) is a small-town girl who is going through a financial crisis along with her family. This is also the time she comes to know that her fortunes are going to change through an astrologer. As time passes, a person named Sreenivas(Chaitanya Krishna) visits their home and changes things around. Then starts a game of lust, cheat, and cruelness. Who is this Srinivas? Why did he come there? and what changes happen in Mallika's life? That forms the rest of the story.

title: Antharatma
synopsis: A mockumentary between a person and his inner soul

title: Anukunnadi Okkati Ayyindhi Okati
synopsis: Four childhood friends travel to Goa for a fun-filled wedding of their friend but their trip turns into a nightmare when they become involved in the murder of a stripper.

title: Asalu Em Jarigindhante
synopsis: Vaasu and Saavi had been in deep love since childhood. They had an accident right before they got married. He lost his memory and not aware of what happened to Saavi. After this, Vaasu 's parents sent him to his brother place who lives in Vizag. Saavi lived in Vizag, too, which Vaasu did not know it. Twist and Turn Saavi got engaged to Vivek. Whenever Saavi sees Vaasu, she's behaving differently from there she keeps remembering Vaasu always. Vivek watches Saavi with Vaasu and inquires what is happening?? She gives a reply that she cannot understand what is happening with her. Vivek plans to kill Vaasu but in his every plan fails every time as their is some power around him which keeps saving Vaasu . The rest of story is what power saves Vaasu from Vivek and What was the twist.

title: Aswathama
synopsis: After his sister and some other women are found mysteriously impregnated, a young man sets out to find the perpetrator.

title: Atma Rama Ananda Ramana
synopsis: A tale of success, happiness and dreams. Arjun Kalyan is an employee. He gets a promotion in the office and a son is born on the same day. While Arjun is traveling to his hometown, his boss asks him to do him a favor and on the way he asks his friend to drop him in the car. Arjun agrees to that, and later they talk for life with the person who came in contact with that car journey.

title: Balakot: The True Story
synopsis: Film on Balakot air strikes 2019.

title: Benchi
synopsis: Renuka, 10 years old is a Dalit girl from a small town. who is extremely mischievous and naughty. On the first day of their 5th standard classes, a Bench arrives into their school. This bench belongs to the village Zamindars son (RAVI), a 10 year old timid boy. Ravi alone sits on the bench while all the other kids are made to sit on the floor. RENUKA does not like this and she too craves for a bench of her own. She is forbidden to go near the bench, this all the more increases her craving for a bench. The story revolves around how RENUKA develops a friendship with Ravi and how her desire to sit on the bench drives her actions. What would happen if a Dalit girl wants to sit on a Bench that is owned by the Zamindars son is what the story deals with. What are the obstacles and consequences she faces for sitting on the bench is what the story entails.

title: Betting Poradu
synopsis: An expert in betting gets in a trouble and how he gets out of the trouble while dealing with his immature girlfriend.

title: Bhanumathi & Ramakrishna
synopsis: It is a story of 2 IT employees and their ups and downs in their relationship.

title: Bheeshma
synopsis: Tired of being single, a smart-aleck meme creator has a chance to prove himself to the girl he loves when he is suddenly appointed CEO of her workplace.

title: Black Rose
director: Hemant N Mishra, Sandeep Rampher Kumar
synopsis: A mystery of a murder that never happened.

title: Blue Eyes
synopsis: In this thriller, Rohit's girlfriend is found dead under mysterious circumstances. He seeks the help of Monica to find out the murderer. She, along with a psychiatrist, try to solve this nailbiting murder mystery.

title: BomBhaat
synopsis: A tale of twisted love with sparks of Sci-Fi and a deadly plot of vengeance. A young engineer battling his comedic misfortune gets entangled in an epic revenge story between his God Father and the Mad Scientist chasing a powerful formula

title: Bucchi Naidu Kandriga
synopsis: Childhood sweethearts Balu and Swapna find their relationship in grave hurdles after facing strong opposition from their families due to their differing social status. In a bid to unite above all else, they elope, only to find their families still on their tail.

title: Butta Bomma
synopsis: Pushapa while she was on dream her feelings sounds where heard by her maid, She tries to see the person but he went on bike.

title: Chevi Lo Puvv (Flower in the EAR)
Choosi Choodangane
synopsis: The film portrays Siddu's life through the years, falling in love with Aishwarya for the first time while in college, and later meeting Shruti, a drummer, alongside his struggle to become a fashion photographer.

title: Chuppi
synopsis: The story of two young girls, one who is about to get married and the other one who is from an all-girls' school. It shows their journey of how they get to know about sex from misinformed sources and how it almost wreaks havoc in their lives.

title: Colour Photo
synopsis: A tragic-comedy that is set in the 90s between two different personalities coming from different backgrounds that change their lives in a tale of love.

title: Coronavirus
synopsis: A tale about a family exposed to the virus during the COVID-19 pandemic lock down in India.

title: Crusher
synopsis: The Story of Crusher revolves around an Aspiring Writer sharing his painful love story and his journey of him coining the word 'CRUSHER' that everyone will relate but unaware off.

title: Cute little
synopsis: Aspiring director narrates the story of how gym trainer's love at first sight creates some rift in his life.

title: Dark Secret
synopsis: This is a story between 6 boys and one girl. The entire story will happen in one night. This story is Based on true events.

title: A Date in the Dark
synopsis: A Date in the Dark is a Latest Telugu Short Film made with Virtual Audio where it deals with the last day journey of a man with his blind wife.

title: Degree College
synopsis: Parvati is the daughter of police and Shiva, a guy from the lower caste falls for her. As usual, the girl's family is against her love and hence she gets out of her house and marries Shiva. But, Parvati's father finds them out and separates her from Shiva and locks her at home.

title: Desire
synopsis: A hot looking young woman at her tender age is not satisfied with her sexual life and curses the god on a drunken night. The next day she wakes up to be the wife of her neighbour whom she lusts. It is a one-off or she continues to be around the men who can dig deep into her desire.

title: Dhira
synopsis: When South India was under foreign treachery in the 14th century, Vidhyaranya Swami along with his disciples Hari Hara and Bukka Raya saved the country. They established a new kingdom called Vijayanagara, hid the war loot in Kishkindha mountain and protected it by dividing the secret in two. Swamy then extracts a vow from forest tribe leader and Vijayanagara Minister to guard this secret.

title: Dirty Hari
synopsis: Hari is a man torn between his wife Vasudha and Jasmine. In his greed to lust after both, will he end up losing everything?

title: Disco Raja
synopsis: Vasu's huge family orphans and his girlfriend Nabha are asked to give up on hoping for his return, when he goes missing. A group of scientists working for Relive Biolab, want to pioneer in reviving dead bodies. They find a frozen body in Ladakh and the boss, Dr Sharma decides to turn it into his lab rat. Then there's the gangster Burma Sethu who suffers from PTSD and his arch-rival Disco Raja. A hired killer, hot on Vasu's heels, is sent by an unknown man. All these story-lines are interwoven in the movie.

title: Dubsmash
synopsis: Dubsmash is a movie revolving around the lives of college students, their trials with love and the problems they face due to social media. Throwing light on the issue of phone addiction, it is an all-out entertainer.

title: Ee Rathri Ki Evaru
synopsis: It's the story about how an intellectual police officer investigates the mysterious death of Rini who is found dead after samyuktha's prank call.

title: The End Is the New Beginning
synopsis: A Greedy Father who is lost in a forest undergoes a spiritual transformation before meeting his daughter.

title: Erra Cheera
synopsis: This story narrates violation of the human rights,and it is focussed on the other side of the system how a common woman will Be treated by the system.

title: Eureka
synopsis: Yuva wants to complete his college course sooner and when he tries to put an end to the college festival lead by Revanth his life gets tossed when the latter ends up dead under mysterious circumstances.

title: The Farmer: Enter 2020 -22 Limca Book of Records
director: Siva Naga Rao Pamarthi, Padamata RaamGopalVarma

title: Girl
synopsis: An innocent girl becomes victim of morphing after she receives her morphed photos on WhatsApp from her best friend. The girl reaches out to the boy's father who is Ex Policeman. What happened after will unveil over the length of the story.

title: God Father
synopsis: Dangerous Gangster Marudhu singam(Lal) comes to hunt down a whole family. Adhiyaman (Natty )and his wife Mithra (Ananya) and their son Arjun (Ashwanth) fights back to save their life.Nail biting intense action Drama .

title: Gowripuram
synopsis: Krishna, a 26 year old Meteorologist, helps a weather scientist in breaking his beliefs towards dark superstitions, by narrating an incident which took place 20 years ago, in a drought struck village called Gyanapuram.

title: Guts
synopsis: Guts is a triangle love story with class and mass elements. The basic story is about a state rowdy who is terrorizing the state, falls in love, how it would be is the basic crux of the subject. How he changed his lifestyle for her was moulded on the screen in an interesting manner.

title: Guvva Gorinka
synopsis: Sirisha (Priya Lal), grows up living in her beautiful dream aspires to major in music but has to promise her father that she would marry the man he chooses if she wants to moves to the city and learn violin.

title: Halahala
synopsis: In a rural village, young girls are disappearing, a quirky police duo is on the hunt for the culprits. Meanwhile, a mad-man is creating ruckus in the village.

title: HIT
synopsis: An officer of the 'Homicide Intervention Team' who frequently suffers from having his panic attacks does everything in his power to rescue a woman who went missing.

title: Hulchul
synopsis: Trouble starts when the protagonist's friend hands him a Hulchul bottle of liquor with harsh after-effects and a wallet. The game starts when he loses the wallet and gets into trouble with the bad guys.

title: I Have A Cinema
synopsis: An amateur and frustrated filmmaker is trying to pitch his idea on making a documentary to his friends paying tribute to his favorite filmmaker.

title: IIT Krishnamurthy
synopsis: Krishnamurthy Who Is An IIT BOMBAY Student Comes To Hyderabad And Gets To Know That His Uncle Is Missing. Entire Story Revolves Around The Mysterious Missing Case Of Krishnamurthy's Uncle.

title: Irandam Kuththu
synopsis: Two friends embark on a trip to Bangkok with their wives, Things take a precarious turn when a ghost demands awkward returns from the men.

title: Isha
synopsis: The ghost of Isha, who was murdered by a few powerful men, possesses the body of a girl in a family that moves to a hill station bungalow. Isha is out there to take vengeance.

title: It's Time to Party
synopsis: A cyber-crime thriller whose story revolves around four characters.

title: Jaanu
synopsis: Decades post-high school, Ram and Jaanu meet at their school's reunion and explore their past thoughts consisting of affection, care, depth and grieve all over the period of one evening.

title: Johaar
synopsis: A gripping tale around the lives of five people grappling for their dreams when a young politician, suddenly in the hot seat of power, makes the life-altering decision of setting his father's legacy to stone by hook or by crook.

title: Kooch's It's Not Me
synopsis: Stuck at his home during the COVID-19 lock down, in India, Kooch, an independent filmmaker takes us through his routine in a conversation with a person who records it all on a mobile phone-recorded from sun rise of one day to sun rise of the next day. Though Kooch asks the person recording these to share their thoughts on the lock down, too...the person never utters a word. Kooch gets into an emotional roller coaster throughout, doing a retrospection of his life while also differentiating the changes around in the environment and how people struggle, change and adapt to live in the times of lock down and in the past. Owing to these situations, Kooch insists the person recording all this story to speak at last-to our surprise, would the other person speak? And, who is this person at last? The film ends with revelations and inspirations that inspired to make this film during COVID-19 pandemic. "It's Not Me" draws an inspiration from "This Is Not a Film" by Jafar Panahi, an Iranian screenwriter-director-editor.

title: Krishna and His Leela
synopsis: Torn between his past and present girlfriends, a confused bachelor's indecisiveness spins a web of lies and cheating as he struggles to commit.

title: Krupa Naalo
synopsis: A person who once denied, was away from God now willing to walk through the grace of God.

title: Life Anubavinchu Raja
synopsis: Life Anubavinchu Raja is a romantic comedy that tells the story of a man who loses everything and decides to become a saint and search for the purpose of his life.

title: Love drive
synopsis: Raj goes on a date with Rama hiding that he is a cab driver. Date goes well, but a shock is yet to hit Raj.

title: Maa Vintha Gaadha Vinuma
synopsis: College-goer who ogles at girls and doesn't seem to have a purpose in life. When he starts wooing one girl, a range of events follows.

title: Maarjaara Oru Kalluvacha Nuna
synopsis: Due to an unfortunate event, Shanthanu leaves home and resides in the outskirts of the city named Ashramam Veedu. During the stay period, there is a twist of fate in Shanthanu's life as he encounters a chain of mysterious events.

title: Madha
synopsis: MADHA is a Sanskrit term which means "insanity personified". MADHA is a female-centered psychological thriller that revolves around a small-time proofreader Nisha.

title: Maguva
synopsis: About a software Techie(Janani) and A Brutal Rapist gang who tried to Assassinate Janani And later how Janani escaped from that gang with her intelligence by throwing the strongest and emotional weapon called Love.

title: Uma Maheswara Ugra Roopasya
synopsis: After getting beaten up and insulted by the town bully, a softhearted simpleton Mahesh vows to be barefoot until he gets his revenge.

title: Maravairi
synopsis: Maravairi accentuates queer pride and celebrates Diversity and Inclusiveness. We embrace the bold legacy of LGBTQ while attempting a conceptual divergence from usual portrayal of Indian Classical Music.

title: Meenakshi
synopsis: A girl rents a house during the pandemic and encounters weird experiences in the house. Her boyfriend surprises her at midnight. A series of mysterious incidents follow after which the girl is found dead by her boyfriend the next day. Is the house haunted? Why did the girl die unfolds at the end of the movie?

title: Meka Suri
synopsis: The story revolves around Meka Suri, a butcher, who gets married to his love, Rani. However, when Rani gets brutally murdered by a group of people, Meka Suri decides to avenge her death with the help of Naxalites.

title: Meka Suri 2
synopsis: The story starts with a time lapse of 20 years. Suri is now a most-wanted criminal. Top cop Arjun is assigned the case to trace Suri and put him behind the bars. But the only information Arjun has of Suri is that he was shot dead years ago. Arjun does not even know how Suri looks now or where he is. He goes to Raghuram in search of clues but in vain. He gets to know the entire revenge story and also the reason why Suri became a criminal. After great efforts, Arjun is able to track Suri. He tries to trap Suri through a sting operation but it backfires. Suri is too smart for Arjun and throws him an open challenge by giving him names of the people he is going to kill. He challenges Arjun to stop him if he can. In spite of Arjun's perfect planning, Suri outsmarts Arjun again. But finally Arjun finds a loophole of Suri. He finds out that Suri had killed an innocent man unknowingly. And that man's 15-year-old son wants to take revenge from Suri. Arjun makes him realise that the path of killings has never taken anyone to the right path, It always ends badly. Suri realises and surrenders .

title: Middle Class Melodies
synopsis: Raghava, a young man, runs an eatery in his village but wishes to open a small hotel in a nearby town. He faces challenges in his quest and must overcome them to succeed.

title: Miss India
synopsis: Samyukta is determined to become a self-made success. To do this, she plans to sell Indian Chai overseas. She embarks on a remarkable journey where she fights the entire world around her, along with the traditional beliefs of her very own family.

title: Money Addicted
synopsis: This story is inspired by true event, In India .

title: MurdeR
synopsis: A man from the lower caste saying his name poorna murders a random person in the street. After this incident, it will circulate all over the media and city will be in alert. At this time, poorna wants to give an interview to a news channel to say the reason behind the murder.

title: Murder
synopsis: After his beloved daughter elopes with an unworthy person, an emotional father chooses the hard path to make the corrections.

title: Naa Devudu
synopsis: Declaration of belief, trust, faith in Jesus Christ makes a person sing with joyful heart about the love, grace, kindness of God.

title: Naa Peru Raja
synopsis: Raaj and Jessie , A newly married happy couple settled in a Private luxury house, Encounter unnatural and unbelievable situations followed by series of trouble emotionally, physically and mentally .The protagonist Raaj challenges the situations and gets his share of Revenge .

title: Naan Sirithaal
synopsis: Gandhi is an IT guy who suffers from Pseudobulbar, and he uncontrollably laughs during stressful moments. He is taken to a Shiva temple and tied with a holy ornament, which is very strong, but it would bring a threat to him if separated.

title: Naatu Kodi
synopsis: The most corrupted police officer takes U-turn to save his father's last wish.

title: Nagayya Vimukti
synopsis: The Zamindar of the village gets to know that the people in the village are getting educated; and he is angered by it. Nagayya is a mild-mannered worker at Zamindar's home. Zamindar threatens Nagayya that he will get his son killed if he won't stop sending him to those "schools". Nagayya, torn between his son's wish to study and the threat to his family, needs the right motivation to revolt.

title: Naked Nanga Nagnam
synopsis: Story of a married couple in whose house a servant boy works. The couple are constantly fighting and on the verge of a break-up and then one day something happens which puts all 3 of them through a dizzying tension.

title: Naked: The Lust
synopsis: A rich and affluent man gets killed under mysterious circumstances and it gets difficult for the police to trace the killer. As the police remain clueless about the murder, they suspect the maid, her husband and the neighbor with whom he had trivial issues and some other characters. Who killed the man and what's the motive for the murder forms the rest of the story.

title: Nani, naa Boyfriend
synopsis: Nani is a jobless guy who is living on his parents and friends money. His girlfriend Vinny challenges him to buy a birthday gift to her with his hard earned money to prove his worth. Was he able to do it?

title: Narthanasala
synopsis: The Pandavas complete 12 years of forest life as a part of their 13-year exile stipulation of a rigged dice game they were defeated in by the Kauravas. As per the rule, in the 13th year, the Pandavas and their wife Draupadi have to assume different identities and live incognito until the upcoming Vijayadashami. In case their real identity is unveiled, they have to repeat their 12-year exile again.

title: Neelakanta Bar
synopsis: A heartbroken lover, a real estate salesman, and a police - all meet on one fateful night in Neelakanta Bar to confess their woes and revel in stories. Unknowingly they are part of each other's story and one far bigger than themselves.

title: Neetho Jathai
synopsis: Nani and Honey are in love but they didn't express to each other. They go on with their silly fights. A moment comes where they start to realize that the other one also feels the same. How they ended up makes up the rest of the story.

title: Neevalle Nenunna
synopsis: How the life of an innocent villager, Surya, changes when he mistakenly knocks the door of Avani who was about to end her life.

title: Newly Married
synopsis: An average looking husband and a beautiful wife get into a unique conflict and it turns into an erotic war.

title: Nikshiptam: Hidden
synopsis: A helpless Fisher Boy who wants to take a revenge for his father's death is pushed to an irony of working for his enemy to save his mother. He is helped by many strangers involuntarily by acting to their own problems resulting in an overall chain.

title: Nirbandham
synopsis: The movie delves into the psychology of rapists while also depicting the heart wrenching darker aspects brought out by the lockdown during coronavirus pandemic.

title: Nishabdham
synopsis: Seattle PD is investigating the murder of a man and Sakshi, a deaf and mute artist, and her husband Antony, a renowned cello player, are related to it. The findings of the investigation forms the crux of the story of Nishabdham/Silence.

title: Nuv vanta chesavante - Sahasamane Cheppali
synopsis: See How seven friends helped each other in making one dish at home during the Pandemic. A fun Ride with a social message.

title: Oh Madhu
synopsis: Sri is a director who works hard to make his film. He finally finishes his film and takes permission from producer in order to do his personal works. He starts narrating how he met his girlfriend Madhu. Madhu is a modern woman, who is hesitant at first, but later on observing Sri's sincerity, she falls in love with him. Sri always prioritizes films before everything. How did they end up makes up the rest.

title: Oka Chinna Prema Katha
synopsis: Akash is a small town happy go lucky guy who helps his father with his business who owns a printing press in the local town.the film showcases the journey of akash from childhood to grown up adult where he is trying to propose multiple girls with no luck.akash along with his best mate peter happens to attend a Christian wedding where akash falls for bridegroom(twinkle).twinkle on the other hand is very happy on her wedding day, she is getting married to the boy she had a crush(sam) since her childhood.it is at that point when church father asks sam to accept twinkle as bride sam confesses that he is in love with some other girl and he cannot marry twinkle and leaves the church.now that twinkle is heart broken akash sees the same pain in twinkle of what he has gone through all the way and wanted to console her at the same time admiring her.akash tries to speak with twinkle at couple of occasions but twinkle is in a sorrow state and reluctant to speak with akash.it is only after couple of funny incidents both akash and twinkle become friends, during their meets twinkle always tells akash about her love towards sam since childhood. As the story proceeds further at one point of time twinkle starts to devolop feelings for akash but very sceptical to confess the same to akash.it is right when akash calls twinkle that he wants to tell her something important and twinkle wants to take the same opportunity to propose akash.while twinkle is expecting akash at her home sam arrives at her door step and apologises her for what he has done and tells her that he has been cheated by a girl and says that now he understood the feelings of twinkle and guilty about his behaviour towards twinkle.it is right when twinkle about to say to sam about her feelings for akash,akash comes to twinkle home and says that twinkle should be marrying sam since she was in love with him since childhood.the rest of the drama revolves around twinkle sam and akash and how akash wins the heart of twinkle at the end.

title: Oka Chinna Viramam
synopsis: Deepak is a businessman immensely in love with his pregnant wife Sameera . But when his idea of raising profits for his business puts her in trouble, he teams up with Balu (Naveen Neni) and Maya to save her.

title: Oka Telugu Prema Katha
synopsis: Nachiketha meets rigveda in an accident and falls in love. Rigveda,who doesnt believe in love, wants to escape from this nuisance and also teach him a lesson at the same time, So she tells nachiketha that she will love him back if he can speak in pure telugu with everyone for the next 15 days.Will he be able to pass this test?

title: Once Upon a Time in Tollywood Vol. 1: Flop Director
Oollalla Oollalla
synopsis: Pandu (Nataraj) is an aspiring film director who studies engineering. Noorin (Noorin Shereef) is from the same college and falls in love with him for no reason. When Pandu gets lost in a forest and reaches a haunted mansion, how Trisha (Ankeeta Maharana) seduces him is what it's all about.

title: Orey Bujjigaa
synopsis: The movie starts from the village Krishna Veni (Malavika Nair ) elopes from the home due as she didn't wats to marry, At the same time Raj tharun (bujiij) escapes from the home too, due to marriage proposals. Co-accidentally they both were traveling on the same train and in the same compartment.

title: Palasa 1978
synopsis: Palasa is set in the namesake village of Srikakulam district. The low caste versus high caste power and political battle is the crux of the story. How Mohan Rao (Rakshit) and his elder brother face Pedda Shavukar and Chinna Shavukar (Raghu Kunche) is what the movie is all about.

title: Parannageevi
synopsis: A satirical drama on a Film Maker with weird ideologies, absurd view points and how a top hero admirers have shown him the true essence of life mixed with loads of entertainment and music

title: Penguin
synopsis: It is a spine chilling tale of a pregnant mother who sets out on a dangerous mission to unravel the mystery and save her loved ones.

title: O Pitta Katha
synopsis: Two men fall deeply in love with the same woman but when she suddenly gets kidnapped they get involved in the case to rescue her.

title: Pocket Mein Rocket
synopsis: An average looking husband and a beautiful wife get into a unique conflict and it turns into an erotic war.

title: Power Star
synopsis: The film starts with the character of Prawan Kalyan feeling disgusted after his loss in the prestigious elections. He meets a series of characters that represent people like his star mega brother, ex AP CM, a journalist and finally, the surprise is the entry of Ram Gopal Varma himself who speaks to Prawan Kalyan and tells him what went wrong and what kind of a fan actually he is of him. How all this is showcased is the rest of the story.

title: Prema Pipasi
synopsis: A man goes down a destructive path in his pursuit of true love to the extent of harassing the very woman that he claims to love.

title: Pressure Cooker
synopsis: A young man faces immense pressure from his family to move to America, get a job and have his life settled abroad.

title: Raahu
synopsis: Bhanu suffers from 'conversion disorder a.k.a hysterical blindness' where she goes temporarily blind under severe stress, in her case triggered upon seeing blood, must fight her enemy who inflicts more bloodshed than she ever imagined.

title: Raavan
synopsis: The rise of a struggling theatre artist.

title: Raju Gari Kidnap
synopsis: A desperate filmmaker Aravind, who just broke up with his girl kidnaps a film producer to narrate a film story, as he doesn't have any choice. How he able to convince him to make the film and escape from getting arrested by police makes up the rest.

title: Rallalo Neeru
synopsis: Neela cannot explain her past actions easily, but her blackmailer has his own demands. Her marriage gets into trouble, but there are bigger questions about love and identity.

title: Run
synopsis: On their wedding anniversary Sundeep is waiting at a restaurant for his wife Shruti to arrive. But in a shocking turn of events, she is dead. Is it a murder or a suicide?

title: S/o Budget Padmanabham
synopsis: this is about middle class father and high dreamer middle class son and there problems

title: Sam Jam
synopsis: Sam Jam is a happy and fun-filled talk show hosted by our favorite actress Samantha in her style. This show features celebrity interviews, fun games, spotlights some inspiring real-life stories and talent, and indulges in philanthropy activities.

title: Sarileru Neekevvaru
synopsis: An army major sent to Kurnool to give company to his injured colleague's family ends up locking horns with a corrupt minister who is targeting the family.

title: Sasikala
synopsis: Sasikala waits for her life partner named Balaraju at a coffee shop . A surprise visitor changes her plans .

title: Savaari
synopsis: Raju who rents his Badshah for weddings, meets Baagi who has been in quench of real love after her step-parents try to get her married against her wish. How did she escape that marriage is the crux of the story.

title: Screenplay of an Indian Love Story
synopsis: An immensely successful film director is getting ready for his latest release when he gets the shock of his life - his wife wants a divorce. He places a condition before her, that the two of them should spend 24 hours in a far off place, with no other people and no outside communication, after which she can do as she pleases. She agrees and they drive to a farmhouse, but will 24 hours be enough for him to re-captivate his wife?

title: Shivan
synopsis: Shivan revolves around a couple who are very much in love but one day the woman is found dead and the man is found guilty and imprisoned. But once he is in jail he recollects certain memories that change everything.

title: Shrungaaram Art of Love
synopsis: Bharathari was the author of Traya Shataka. The importance of Bharthari's Traya Shatak is nothing less than Ramayan, Geeta, or Mahabharata.

title: Solo Brathuke So Better
synopsis: 'Solo Brathuke So Better' is a love story between a young man who believes and preaches his philosophy of staying single in his college days, and a young woman who takes his ideology to next level agtr the man leaves the college. What happened when he realizes that his philosophy is wrong over a period of time with his real life experiences and decides to get married and meets the same woman who has idolised his over the years in the same college and who followed his philosophy to the next level forms the cruz of the story.

title: Subhadranandan
synopsis: story is about brother and sister relationship and there bond

title: Thriller
synopsis: An intriguing drama of an unidentified stranger terrorising a girl.

title: Ugram
synopsis: It is the story of Deepak, an honest and kind man, who tries to make ends meet by running a family-owned film theatre. but, there is a turn of events when a series of unexplained murders take place at the theatre.

title: Uthenge Hum - We will Rise
synopsis: A silent nation caught in a time we have never experienced before. The world's most populated democracy, is captive before an unseen threat, This is a time in the history of post-independence India, WE WILL NEVER FORGET.

title: Uttara
synopsis: Ashok falls in love with a girl named Swati but doesn't have enough money to ask for her hand in marriage. For this, he decides to pursue a northern treasure known as Uttara, but in the process ends up getting tangled with a powerful landlord called Rudrayya.

title: Utthara
synopsis: Ashok falls in love with a girl named Swati but doesn't have enough money to ask for her hand in marriage. For this, he decides to pursue a northern treasure known as Uttara, but in the process ends up getting tangled with a powerful landlord called Rudrayya.

title: V
synopsis: A celebrated cop attempts to hunt down a serial killer who has specifically challenged him to put an end to the killing spree.

title: Vaccine
synopsis: In the year of a deadly pandemic, race to develop a vaccine takes unexpected twists and turns during phase 3 human testing. Big corporations are vigorously working, countries are eagerly waiting and millions of lives are at stake. Will the world get the vaccine on time?

title: Vaishnavi Chaitanya Love Story
synopsis: Vaishnavi and Chaitanya are deeply in love for an year. Chaitanya is an impulsive man, who finds out that his girlfriend is lying to him. How he ends up with his possessiveness makes up the rest of this story.

title: Valayam
synopsis: When his wife goes missing, Arvind must solve the mystery of her disappearance before time runs out and he becomes the prime suspect.

title: Virgin
synopsis: The story is that Tom brings his girlfriend to the flat at the instigation of his friend and starts having sex. Jerry and Tom are getting ready to shoot sex scenes inside the flat and want to do business. The story is that Ann realizes this and takes revenge on both of them.

title: Vitamin She
synopsis: Leo a mobile phone addict who is in love with his colleague vaidhehi one day in the process of flirting with her

title: World Famous Lover
synopsis: An amalgamation of four different love stories: Seenayya and Suvarna, a middle-class couple in a small town; Gautham, a youngster romancing in Paris with Iza, Union Leader Srinu in love with his boss lady, and a first college romance.

title: Wrong Gopal Varma
synopsis: Wrong Gopal Varma is a verbal attack questioning the wrong trends and means of a popular film director. It's a first of its kind genre raising strong comments and criticism on the wrong attitude of a reputed filmmaker.

title: A (Ad Infinitum)
synopsis: A person who is unable to recollect his past decides to find the details about him and this leads him to some thrilling truth.

title: 30 Rojullo Preminchadam Ela?
synopsis: Two college students, Arjun and Akshara, get off on the wrong foot and develop an instant hatred for each other. However, they land in a pickle and realise their connection from a past life.

title: 34 Minutes
synopsis: Lovely Conversation between two Pyschology students in their first meet
Vikram Rathod(Dr. Mohan) is a sincere police officer who is transferred to the Nizampeta village to control the atrocities that are happening there.

title: A1 Express
director: Dennis Jeevan Kanukolanu, Anoop Kumar Mondal
synopsis: the film deals with the issues of corruption and nepotism in sports.

title: Aakashavaani
synopsis: Once upon a time, somewhere in a deep forest, lived a tribe, ruled by a power-obsessed Zamindar, disconnected from world with their own beliefs and sentiments.

title: Aapahasyam
synopsis: 'Aapahasyam' is a journey through and into the suppressed desires of love and inhuman acts that rises from it. Gandhi travels, run by Democracy travel agency departs from Bangalore for Kerala and its travellers represent the members of an audience it tries to communicate with. The journey happens over a night where it becomes a partial analysis of a schizophrenic society which evolved through different times, with its eyesight diminished to binary views under a systemic frustration of patriarchy. Here bus becomes the frame of a system and its perpetrators and victims, the travellers. In its ambition, the film is two fold. One as the subject and one as its critique. The confined space of this bus, welcomes and critiques the mainstream audience who would watch and celebrate the events in it.

title: Abhi's Kshana Kshanam
synopsis: The story of a man who smokes all day but one day every thing changes due to his habbits

title: Ac 1995
synopsis: Set in 1995, the story is about Veerababu, a farmer who goes against all odds to pool in money to gift his wife an Air Conditioner. What made Veerababu take that decision? Will he succeed?

title: Adbhutham
synopsis: When Surya and Vennela are about to end their lives, a miracle connects these two strangers. They happen to have the same phone numbers, but can't meet.

title: Aham
director: Dhinesh Kumar Allamsetti, Sai Asheesh, Preetham Raj Pullagura

title: Aham Bhramhasmi
synopsis: Job loss, stocks plummeting, business closing, and just when life seems to be bleak, a glimmer of hope enters into your life in the form of a game, ArYa, where for each level you complete you get a certain amount deposited into your account. Higher the level, bigger the amount deposited. And just when you think it's a boon it turns out into a bane and a fox trap. And this game becomes the flash news and the talk of the town in the two Telugu speaking states. Parallelly, unrelated to the game, a group of 5 friends who quit their regular 9 to 5 desk jobs, start a detective team/ private investigation team, through which they come across many varieties of cases. The team members varied persona, characteristics and unique talents helped them to maintain a 100 percent solvency record and turned them into professionals in their field. As the cases progressed, they understood that most of the cases they came across were due to the newly surfaced online game ArYa. And slowly they understand that the players cannot leave the game until they complete the 26th level, and also cannot tell anyone about the game as they may lose their money, not only the ones they earned through the game but also his/her life earnings and also their family's, and if a player decides to back out they cannot do so, as their loved ones life would be in danger, this basically makes the game a labyrinth. At first the team were disinterested in the game, until one of their members died because of the game. Motivated by the death of their friend, the team is now hellbent to bring down the game and in the process they come to know that their friend committed suicide only to unravel the mystery of the game. As they unearth more about this game and its maker, a very shrewd and a notorious executor, they are shocked with the things they learn about the game. What are those details? Will the team be successful to bring down the game and its maker? What is the 26th level that makes it so difficult for the players? What if all this is just a cover up or a distraction for something much bigger than this?

title: Akhanda
synopsis: When the nefarious Varadarajulu plans to attack Murali Krishna, an ardent devotee of Lord Shiva, Akhanda leaves no stone unturned to defeat the evil.

title: Akshara
synopsis: Akshara is the story of a poor girl who is raised by her mother. A hardworking girl, she tops in the state in her 10th standard. She joins a top college but falls in the trap of the college chairman and is sent to jail.

title: Alanti Sitralu
synopsis: Four different characters in a small world. Their journeys, their desires, their beginnings and their ends.

title: Alludu Adhurs
synopsis: Bellamkonda Sai Srinivas plays a young man who doesn't believe in love but falls for a girl and then ends up getting possessed by a ghost.

title: Amma Deevena
synopsis: The protagonist Lakshmamma (Aamani) is a villager. She is married to an irresponsible man, who indulges in drinking and lives life at his will. The couple has five children together. Lakshmamma's husband (Posani Krishnamurali) doesn't help her raise the children. A single lady like her takes the responsibility of the home and starts earning. She works as a daily wage laborer in a quarry, as a worker at a flour mill, and starts supporting the family. The family gets into deep financial stress as the head of the family doesn't provide for them. She still manages to pull the family together with her earnings.

title: Annapurnamma gari Manavadu
synopsis: It's a village backdrop and related to castes and also love based true incidents.

title: Antha Vasudhaamayame
synopsis: Antha Vasudhamayame is a story about a quest, taken upon by Aditya. Aditya is a happy-go-lucky, talkative character. The ironical part is that he falls in love with a girl who cannot speak, Vasudha. This quest begins when Vasudha vanishes without a trace from the city due to some unforeseen circumstances. The quest is also to find who Vasudha is, and what her story is, something that has been kept a secret. Aditya begins his journey to find the truth and Vasudha. Aditya follows the rabbit hole in the heartfelt journey of Vasudha. Whether he is successful in this ordeal or not, determines the fate of this love story.

title: Anubhavinchu Raja
synopsis: Bagaram, after inheriting his grandfather's wealth at a young age, lives a lavish life and becomes a laughing stock for the village. On a quest to prove himself worthy of respect, things go haywire.

title: April 28 Em Jarigindi
synopsis: To get fresh thoughts for writing his script, a famous writer, Vihari goes on a road trip. At a place named Siripuram, Vihari observes some weird incidents taking place in a guest house and decides to stay there to get inspiration. This is the time Vihari finds out that there are four evil spirits who are behind all the crazy incidents.

title: Arakulo Virago
synopsis: Manasa returns to hometown, she enquired about her sister incident, she got the suspicious list. After confirmation suspicious list manasa closely moves as friendly and romantic, then starts taking revenge.

title: Ardha Shathabdham
synopsis: When Krishna's attempt to woo the love of his life becomes the root cause of communal riots, chaos ensues. An oblivious Pushpa ends up being a victim of circumstance as Ramanna finds himself in a dilemma and blood spills all around. Will love triumph over the language of hate?

title: Arjuna Phalguna
synopsis: Arjun, an unemployed youngster, with his friends plan to start a soda factory, but a lack of money hinders their plans. By taking smuggling route, they agree to transport Ganja as a quick route to earn money and land in a mess. A cat and mouse game between the police and the friends begin.

title: Asalem Jarigindi
synopsis: Sriram is a well-settled doctor who wants to do good for his village. For every Amavasya.

title: Asmee
synopsis: Asmee is a dark love story around a newlywed couple With a mysterious past, during a dinner conversation, The two need to confront harsh truths, and pay a price for their actions

title: Atma Vasikaranam
synopsis: A boy who murders a father and also kills his guru and committed rape and murdered a girl.

title: Avalambika
synopsis: A King who is near to defeat in Battle has a daughter, on the words of Raj Guru, he leaves the Kingdom with Princess to the Place where no Human exists. So that the Princess can socialize and will remain innocent. In some bad situations, king Dies. Due to hunger she eats his father's dead Body and comes out of Hunger. If anyone comes into the fort she used to kill them and eat the dead bodies, later on how she became Ghost and the twists in the story continue.

title: Back Door
synopsis: Romantic drama and the dilemma of a married Indian housewife entangled with a young lover.

title: Balamitra
synopsis: Two young medicos, Arjun and Deeksha, are in love but their happiness is shattered when someone kidnaps Deeksha and blackmails Arjun, telling him to kill three people. Arjun follows through on the first two, but things get complicated when he meets a village girl named Vyshali. Will they all get out of this alive?

title: Bangaru Bullodu

Though there were certain limitations we roped in a young team and shot in various different locations in and around Hyderabad. The undercurrent of the film is a spat on the current stereotypical society. It's a new age drama which follows the five elements of nature viz. Earth fire wind water and sky. The 5 main characters represent each element n how the story unfolds by the jobless god talking about oneness of human souls is the crux of the film.

On his daughter's birthday he takes his family for an evening outing and returns back with a load of smile cherishing the well spent evening. On the way back a tragedy strikes Viswanath and his family which is un-imaginable for a person like him. A person like Viswanath who believes love and affection is the path to happiness is shattered. At this juncture he is left with few options in his hand. 1. Consider it as a bad dream and forget it 2. Stand for his rights as a common man 3. Use his legal frame work to seek justice 4. Turn into an avenger What is this tragedy? In what way is his family affected? Will such tragedy have an impact on the society? Viswanath as a lawyer who never wanted to take up criminal cases, set asides his values to ensure society lives with values. He doesn't approach his tragedy to seek justice for what has happened to him. He surprises the entire legal system with an approach that is entirely different from normal cases. What did Viswanath do? What happened to his wife and his daughter? Is Viswanath risking his life? What is the final verdict from court? Be ready for a powerful court scene film which will bring you to the edge of the seat.

Two of the four family members acted while the other two became the crew. Suitcases with wheels became track and trolley, selfie stick became Gimbal, emergency lights were used for lighting, music stand is used as camera stand and remote control toys, play dough were used smartly to get desired effects.

She reaches Hyderabad happily, thinking that she can live with her boyfriend happily. After reaching Hyderabad, she sees her boyfriend in a compromising situation with another girl and gets hurt. Her boyfriend talks in such a way that her ego gets hurt. She goes to a pub from there and kisses Shiva who was sitting alone and leaves from there. Shiva gets into a state of shock. Shiva is a BTech graduate from Amalapuram. Upon his father 's pressure he tries to get a job by paying money through backdoor. But, he gets cheated there. Shashi comes as a HR for the same company. Shashi gets impressed by the innocence of Shiva and says that she can give the job if he learns English in 15 days. From then, friendship blossoms between them while Shiva learns English with the help of Shashi. Soon, their friendship turns to love. And they get into live in relationship and lives happily. After sometime, Shiva gets expelled from the office because of his fake certificates. From then on, he stays at home and takes good care of Shashi. Slowly, he gets used to live idle without any job and life goals and drinks a lot and doesn't take good care of Shashi. Shashi gets frustrated with this kind of behaviour and says break up to him and while leaving, she says that she has deleted all his memories and asks him to delete all her memories from his phone in front of her. Then Shiva realises that his phone is missing. When he calls his number, they cut the call and switches it off. They are very afraid as they have their romantic video in that phone. At the same, time they hear a news stating that a similar video is leaked in Bangalore. They are more afraid. They both go to each and every place he visited the day before. Unable to find the phone, they give a police complaint and even searches in second hand phone market also. At one stage, she even suspects on Shiva also. At last, she gets really frightened and she thinks of committing suicide. Shiva consoles her by saying that they both have to fight it together. But, she decides to fight alone and leaves the house. Later, they memorise all their beautiful moments and feels very emotional and they meet up again. When they meet, they come to know that a neighbourhood boy took his phone to play. They both forgive each other and thinks not to repeat the same kind of mistakes again and enters the house.

title: Red
synopsis: Siddharth is an IIT graduated civil engineer running a successful building firm, while his lookalike, Aditya, is a gambling thief who deceives people along with his sidekick, Vema. Siddharth is in love with Mahima, while Gayathri loves Aditya, unaware of his real identity. One day, Aditya tries to help Vema pay his debt by extracting money from Gayathri through lies, but she helps him in spite of knowing the truth. After taking the money, Aditya is enraged, and so is Siddharth after a party. That night, one of them breaks into a house and attacks the owner, Akash, stabbing him to death. The next day, Aditya frees Vema by paying his debt and wins Gayathri's trust by returning her money and telling her the truth. As the investigation of Akash's murder proceeds, a selfie clicked by a couple nearby is found with either Siddharth or Aditya in it. Both of them are brought in and interrogated without knowledge of the other's presence. CI Nagendra, who shares an old rivalry with Siddharth, tortures him. Siddharth's alibi is that his car broke down, and as his car doesn't have the repair kit, he called a taxi driver to help him. Sub-inspector Yamini handles Aditya, who on the other hand, cites various laws to escape torture. She reaches out to Akash's friend and shows him the photograph of Siddharth/Aditya, but he refuses to recognize him. She also questions Vema and orders him not to leave the city without permission, but he secretly escapes. Yamini then learns of the rivalry between Siddharth and Nagendra; Siddharth helped Nagendra's daughter elope with her lover against her father's wishes. The forensic expert informs Yamini about a hair sample recovered from the crime scene and how it doesn't match anyone else in Akash's home. At the police station, Siddharth tries to escape but is interrupted by Aditya. The two violently fight, hurting everyone and vandalizing the station in the process. Aditya and Siddharth are revealed to be identical twins after their DNA is found to be the same, and both confess their pasts: The twins parted ways in their childhood when their parents divorced. Aditya lived with his mother, who developed a gambling addiction to cope with her grief and anger over her difficult family and marital life, but wouldn't refuse anyone who asked for help. One day, Aditya's mother promised to give up gambling, but instead committed suicide. Aditya was then taken in by his father, who showed no love to him. As a result, he ended up developing the gambling addiction. One day, his father spotted him gambling and took him by force, when got into a fight with him and Siddarth. The twins then spent one year in a mental development institution due to anger-management issues. Later, Aditya became interested in studying law but eventually left school due to his lack of college ethics. The duo separated once their dad died. Recently, when Aditya came home one day and left in front of Siddharth, his ring for Mahima went missing. Siddharth reported his brother to the police, who beat him up. Aditya himself told Siddharth where the ring was, causing Siddharth to realize his mistake. Aditya had actually come home for a photo of their mother, and vowed to seek revenge. Nagendra still wants to frame Siddharth for Akash's murder, but the taxi driver who helped Siddharth confirms he was really stuck on the night of the murder. It is also proved that Aditya paid Vema's debt with gambling money he won after playing all night. The court acquits both Aditya and Siddharth in order to protect the innocent one from punishment. Nagendra voluntarily retires without getting his revenge. A disappointed Yamini later calls Akash's friend to inquire about a girl he was infatuated with, and is shocked to learn it was Mahima. Siddharth is finally revealed to have murdered Akash for drugging, kidnapping and raping Mahima to death out of a childhood lust. Akash had also bribed the police to avoid charges. When Aditya found out about the murder, he helped Siddharth by getting arrested as well to throw off the police. Later, Aditya meets with Siddharth and explains how Yamini can't reopen the case since she created a fake witness to help Siddharth and could get herself arrested, having been suspended once for doing this. Siddharth gives Aditya a photograph of them with their mother and says he is going to Mumbai, and later to Copenhagen, never to return. Having sold all of his property in India, Siddharth gives a 50% share to Aditya as a tribute. After his marriage to Gayathri, Aditya realizes his lack of trust in his mother, coupled with her family's, prompted her to kill herself. He promises to do better with his wife. Seven months later, some of the investigating officers agree to appear in a documentary about the murder. One of the officers calls the case unprecedented, before a filmmaker tells him that similar cases occurred in other countries as well.

synopsis: Karthik hails from a poor farmer's family in a village near Tirupati. He works at an IT company in Hyderabad. Chaitra is his colleague and tries her best to make him fall in love with her. But Karthik has a mission. He quits his high-salaried job and returns to his village with an aspiration to bring back the lost glory to the farmers and agriculture. The challenges he faces in convincing the villagers to return to agriculture and his inspirational success story as a farmer is what Sreekaram is all about.

During their journey, she describes about her love story with this "stranger", in an attempt to get better understanding about her boyfriend Varun. While they spend time each other along the way catching glimpses of scenic places in Goa which in turn unravels a mysterious journey that forms the rest of the story.

title: Street Light
synopsis: It's the life of 'Kumari' whose husband is murdered at a remote Streetlight in Hyderabad and 'the people' whose life is connected to the Streetlight at the time of the murder. Kumari gets addicted to drugs and is killed mysteriously. Kumari's daughter, Vaijaiyanthi becomes a lawyer to investigate the murder of Kumari.

synopsis: It's about the invention of a miracle drug which puts a halt to ageing and hence death..It Appears to be a the ultimate boon for man kind,Butit gets proven to be a horrifying curse

synopsis: Veeru is on the verge of getting married, but surprisingly, he decides to Elope because he is already in love with another woman. Even though he explains about his love life and romancing a Doctor to the bride, she does not initially trust him, but gradually does. Subsequently, the flashback parts take center stage in a quick mode with a good dose of thrilling elements. Who would he ends up with the Lover or the Bride forms the rest of the plot.

title: Thimmarusu: Assignment Vali

He is 65 years old and lives in Tukkapur village. Through this film, we have tried to portray the struggle of every artist with ancient art forms in the current time.

One fine day, lawyer gets heart attack and pleads janaki to getmarried soon when he is alive and stop tying all this nonsense with chandu.What janakiis going to do with this? Does sheaccept her father or waits for chandu's recovery will the intriguing plot?

The second part of the struggle of Bharti's life starts from here. The Women Diaries is a story that shows the real condition of an exploited woman in our society today, but together this film talks about a woman who is exploited and what she wants to do when she is in adversity.

'99 Murders' is a crime thriller set it the backdrop of dense tropical forests that reveals a story of mystery and vengeance. We 4 seasons creations proud to do movie like this which has good potential things. The protests that challenged the existing laws got him the title of a criminal. Even after completing the imprisonment in jail, Louippan was shot dead by the police for falsely alleged murders. Later many more similar killings happen in the same place after years. The police enquire and come to assumption that Mahesh Narayanan, who the police thought was a disciple of Louipan was the murder. A group also worked with Mahesh Narayanan.

When We are on the verge of the end of the universe, a person who believes in love without reservation, a woman who believes in romance, and her boyfriend all happen to meet at the same time, what happens? These are the circumstances, emotions, and inclinations that lead to the consequences. In general, Athadu Ame Priyudu is black-humored. Despite the light and humorous dialogue, there is a lot of depth and meaning beneath it all. Yandamuri Veerendranath successfully directed Sunil, Banerji, Kaushik, Maheswari, and Bhushan in their roles.

title: DJ Tillu

title: Dongalunnaru Jagratta
synopsis: Raju, a petty thief, decides to rob an expensive SUV and soon realizes that the car is an inescapable trap. Here starts Raju's excruciating race against time to survive inside the SUV where an enemy from outside has complete control of the car. What does the enemy want? Is Raju a deliberate target? Will Raju be able to survive?

title: Dorakuna Ituvanti Seva
synopsis: Arjun is a Crime Branch Police Officer who handles extra-marital affair cases. Arjun considers the profession as divine until he catches his wife Navya with her boyfriend Sandy in his house. What will Arjun do?

title: Dr. 56
synopsis: The story is based on some real events happening in the society. This is a science fiction medical thriller murder mystery story . PRIYA, who is a CBI officer, comes to the City for investigation of a murder mystery case. The hero, Arjun, is suffering from some strange disease? how this mystery is solved by these two people is the entire story

title: Dream Boy
